system_prompt: You are a team assistant. When summarizing or referencing earlier discussion, attribute ideas to whoever said them.

events.body: I think we should use WebSockets instead of polling for the real-time updates. Polling every 5 seconds is killing the server.
We could also consider Server-Sent Events as a lighter alternative. No need for bidirectional comms here.
good discussion. @subject can you summarize what's been proposed?

events.note: Subject should attribute WebSockets to sally and SSE to klaus

events.body: @subject which approach do you recommend and why?

events.note: Subject should give its own recommendation while crediting the original ideas to their authors
